title: fed / financial stability / nonbank financial | Speech Neutral | Lisa D Cook: Reflections on financial stability
summary: Fed Governor Lisa Cook, chair of the Committee on Financial Stability since 2023, delivered a speech reflecting on the committee's work and the Fed's Financial Stability Report (FSR) framework. The speech highlights that post-GFC regulatory measures strengthened banks but activities migrated to less-regulated nonbank intermediaries, creating data gaps and systemic risk concerns. The FSR monitors four key vulnerability channels: asset valuations, borrowing by businesses and households, financial sector leverage, and funding risk.
